name: /pr-corpus-update message when budget exhausted includes the next reset timestamp so operator can plan
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus && printf '{"cfpb-consumerfinance":{"used_today":100000,"date":"2026-05-13"}}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/budget.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-corpus-update.sh" --source cfpb-consumerfinance --estimated-tokens 1 --budget .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/budget.json --now 2026-05-13T12:00:00Z --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'budget_exhausted' out.txt && grep -q 'resets_at=2026-05-14T00:00:00Z' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
